heading: Definitions
label: 690 Definitions
notes: Effective DatePart effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2

children.heading: Operational assistance
children.label: 1 Operational assistance
children.text: The term “operational assistance” means management, marketing, and other technical assistance that assists a small business concern with business development.

children.label: A
children.text: details the operating plan and investment criteria of the company; and

children.label: B
children.text: requires the company to make investments in smaller enterprises primarily engaged in researching, manufacturing, developing, producing, or bringing to market goods, products, or services that generate or support the production of renewable energy.

children.heading: Renewable energy
children.label: 3 Renewable energy
children.text: The term “renewable energy” means energy derived from resources that are regenerative or that cannot be depleted, including solar, wind, ethanol, and biodiesel fuels.

children.label: i
children.text: has been granted final approval by the Administrator under ; andsection 690c(e) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: has entered into a participation agreement with the Administrator; or

children.label: B
children.text: that has received conditional approval under .section 690c(c) of this title

children.heading: State
children.label: 5 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the several States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, and any other commonwealth, territory, or possession of the United States.

children.heading: Venture capital
children.label: 6 Venture capital
children.text: The term “venture capital” means capital in the form of equity capital investments, as that term is defined in .section 683(g)(4) of this title
